title: Parathelypteris gracilescens
taxonomy: Parathelypteris gracilescens is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the marsh fern family. This plant is further classified as belonging to the genus Parathelypteris, a group of ferns native to East Asia. Within the genus Parathelypteris, Parathelypteris gracilescens is considered to be a species of fern that is relatively rare and endemic to specific regions. As a member of the family Thelypteridaceae, Parathelypteris gracilescens exhibits characteristics typical of this family, including the presence of pinnate leaves and a rhizomatous growth habit. The classification of Parathelypteris gracilescens highlights the complex relationships within the fern plant kingdom.
